item.title: Test Project — AI Playground
item.description:
This is a test project to verify the project pages render correctly.

Features

  • Interactive AI experiments
  • Multi-model comparison
  • Real-time inference demos

item.title: OpenAI Assistant API — Open-Source Implementation
item.description: A production-grade open-source implementation of the OpenAI Assistant API with full compatibility for threads, messages, tools, and vector stores. Features custom model routing, local deployment support, and enhanced streaming capabilities.

item.title: NeuralChat — Lightweight Conversational AI Framework
item.description: A lightweight framework for building and deploying conversational AI systems. Supports multiple backend providers (OpenAI, Anthropic, local models) with a unified API interface, custom fine-tuning pipelines, and RAG integration.

item.title: AutoML Pipeline Toolkit
item.description: An automated machine learning toolkit featuring Bayesian optimization, evolutionary algorithms, and neural architecture search. Built on PyTorch with GPU acceleration and distributed training support.
